# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the diff (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json`); the changes are limited to run tracking metadata/events for final-review proposal entry (new `stage_resolution_snapshot` and two reviewer start events). No code or implementation logic was modified, so no correctness/safety/robustness issues were introduced in this patch.

## Amendments

None.
